name_en: Saudi Man Lifestyle — Thobe Casual Moment
purpose: Saudi man in white thobe and ghutra, casual moment with brand product. Phone-camera, candid.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Authentic candid lifestyle photograph of a Saudi man in his late twenties to early thirties wearing crisp white thobe with traditional collar, white ghutra head covering with black iqal, well-groomed short beard, casually holding or interacting with {brand_product}, seated or standing in modern Saudi setting like café or office lounge, natural daylight from window, real visible skin texture with subtle pores and natural Mediterranean Arab complexion, candid expression looking off-camera or downward at product, hand naturally gripping or gesturing, shot as if from friend's iPhone at chest height with slight grain, focal length 28mm phone camera, authentic non-staged composition, warm interior tones {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: smooth airbrushed skin
Never present non-Saudi talent or generic Middle-Eastern look — Saudi specificity is the point
Avoid tourist-photography aesthetic; this is lived-in lifestyle, not destination shoot
notes: Intents: grow, defend, recover. Source code in research corpus: S02. Saudi adaptation guidance: Default white thobe canonical Saudi. White or red-checked ghutra. Iqal essential — visual marker confirming Saudi rather than Gulf-generic. Beard modern short-trimmed. Reference image: Not required. Recommended frequency: 2-3 per week for male-audience brands. Compliance level: elevated.
